title: Jack’s Attack Is Explained
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on jack’s attack is explained within the The Guardians of Zou storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Oi Luffy! Where'd they get ya! You still have all your arms and legs!?

dialogue.speaker: Bepo
dialogue.text: Listen up, Nami-dog-woman! That's our captain you've got over there!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: We know you're tryna turn him into lunchmeat! And we won't have any of it! You crazy carnivore!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You better give us back our other friends too! The ones that showed up here before us! Otherwise this guy's santoryu is gonna cut you 3 new ones!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Sheesh. You definitely don't get what's going on here, do you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Look a bit closer. Inside the mist.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: That's the fortress right there, and those are the gatekeepers!

dialogue.speaker: Pedro
dialogue.text: Are they the whale forest invaders?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: They bore us no ill will.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: by mistake, one of them, without ringing the "bell of welcome,"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Open the gate and tell everyone! Tell them that the straw hat crew has arrived!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Luffy and the others are here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: They've made it safe and sound!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Just now! They just passed the fortress gates!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Oh, so your friends have come... wonderful.

summary: Jack’s Attack Is Explained: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
